sections.paragraph:
verb לברור

to select, choose; clarify; research

verb להיברר

be selected; chosen; purified

verb לברר

to inquire; clarify; purify; choose; sieve

verb בורר

be selected; sieved; clarified

verb להתברר

be made clear; be purified; be sieved

verb הוברר

become clarified, clear

verb לברר (>>בירר)

to inquire; clarify; purify; choose; sieve
